meta_description: Hangzhou Karn New Building Materials Co., Ltd. specializes in wallpaper adhesive powder OEM/ODM contract manufacturing, offering small package sizes including 200g, 500g, 1kg with custom branding and packaging design.

hero.title: Professional Wallpaper Adhesive Contract Manufacturing
hero.subtitle: Specialized in wallpaper adhesive powder OEM/ODM, offering custom small packaging services (200g, 500g, 1kg), from formula development to packaging design, creating your exclusive brand.

services.title: Our Contract Manufacturing Services
services.subtitle: Professional wallpaper adhesive contract manufacturing with small package customization, providing one-stop solutions from product development to global logistics for your brand.

development.title: Formula Customization
development.description: Customize wallpaper adhesive powder formulations according to your market needs, including eco-friendly, high-strength types, ensuring product performance meets your brand standards.

manufacturing.title: Small Package Production
manufacturing.description: Professional production of wallpaper adhesive powder in various small package sizes including 200g, 500g, 1kg. Modern production lines ensure stable product quality, meeting retail market demands.

logistics.title: Packaging Customization
logistics.description: Professional packaging design and customization services, supporting custom brand logo printing. Exquisite packaging helps your brand stand out in the market.

process.title: OEM Collaboration Process
process.subtitle: Our OEM process is simple and efficient, ensuring perfect execution at every stage from concept to delivery of your branded products.

consultation.title: Requirements Consultation
consultation.description: Our sales and technical teams communicate deeply with you to understand your product requirements, target markets, and budget.

development.title: Product Development
development.description: Our R&D team develops custom formulations based on your needs and provides samples for testing and evaluation.

production.title: Mass Production
production.description: Once the product formula is confirmed, we begin mass production with strict quality control throughout the process.

delivery.title: Packaging & Logistics
delivery.description: We package according to your brand guidelines and deliver products to their destination through reliable logistics channels.

advantages.title: Why Choose Our Contract Manufacturing Services
advantages.subtitle: Hangzhou Karn New Building Materials Co., Ltd. specializes in wallpaper adhesive contract manufacturing, providing professional small package customization services for global brands.

facilities.title: Small Package Production Line
facilities.description: Equipped with professional small package production lines and automated packaging equipment, efficiently producing various sizes including 200g, 500g, 1kg. Low minimum order quantities, flexibly meeting different customer needs.

team.title: Packaging Design Capability
team.description: Professional packaging design services available, supporting customer-provided designs or our design services. Exquisite packaging enhances brand image and makes your products more competitive on shelves.

experience.title: Rich Contract Manufacturing Experience
experience.description: Provided wallpaper adhesive contract manufacturing services to brands in multiple countries, deeply understanding different market needs and standards, ensuring your products meet local market requirements.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Wallpaper Adhesive Brand?
cta.description: Contact our professional team to discuss your wallpaper adhesive contract manufacturing needs. We will provide you with small package customization solutions and detailed quotations.
